N_B13B_VSP_VC_20201103

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 73F
Recv ID: 761
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 81
Func Name: VSP

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "32",
    "supplier": "2RH5L9",
    "soft": "1111",
    "version": "0000"
  }
]

    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "[B2860](TBD)CONTROL UNIT(CAN)"
